title: 5 Amazing Space Facts
script:
Space is bigger than you can possibly imagine.

[Visual: milky way galaxy from space]
Fact one: There are more stars in the universe than grains of sand on all of Earth's beaches. And we can only see about 5,000 of them with the naked eye.

[Visual: Saturn with its rings]
Fact two: Saturn is so light that it would actually float in water. Its density is less than water's.

[Visual: astronaut floating in space]
Fact three: Astronauts grow taller in space. Without gravity compressing their spines, they can gain up to 3 inches.

[Visual: moon surface]
Fact four: The Moon is moving away from Earth at about 1.5 inches per year. In 50 billion years, it will take 47 days to orbit us.

[Visual:太阳系 with all planets]
Fact five: A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus. It takes 243 Earth days to rotate once, but only 225 days to orbit the Sun.
